title: Compat O' Plenty
description: Compat O' Plenty integrates a few popular mods with Biomes O' Plenty for a more complete experience!
body:
Requires [Blueprint](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blueprint) and [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)!

![Demo Image 1](https://i.imgur.com/R3mRNwu.png)

Contents:

[Quark:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark) Bookshelves, ladders, chests, hedges, posts, vertical planks and leaf carpets for all of BoP's woods and leaves! Also sandstone bricks for orange, white and black sandstone, a glowing moss counterpart to midori, and all relevant vertical slabs!

[Buzzier Bees:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buzzier-bees) Beehives for all of BoP's woods!

[Farmer's Delight:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) Cabinets for all of BoP's woods and all relevant recipes for the cutting board!

[Twigs:](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs) Tables for all of BoP's woods and a counterpart to polished amethyst made of rose quartz!

Additionally, this mod adds all the relevant recipes for [Environmental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental)'s kiln and sawmill!

![Demo Image 2](https://i.imgur.com/hfBaiGQ.png)

Additional Credits:

Logo art by _JWX!

Russian localisation by mirkiv224!
